expectations.text: uses_nimble_extract_or_map: The agent ran nimble extract or map targeting docs.python.org
covers_main_groups: Mentions at least 2 of the key categories/functions
expectations.evidence: response.md covers all three groups: Infinite Iterators, General Iterators, Combinatoric Iterators; mentions chain, islice, groupby, product, combinations, permutations, count, cycle

expectations.text: structured_output: Output is organized into categories, not a flat list
expectations.evidence: response.md has three distinct ## sections with tables

expectations.text: no_hallucination_check: No invented functions like itertools.map or itertools.filter
expectations.evidence: All functions listed (accumulate, batched, chain, compress, etc.) are real itertools members; no itertools.map or itertools.filter present
